properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 87/20


NORWEGIAN SEA


ANDØYA SPACE CENTER WILL CONDUCT NAVAL EXERCISE IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM 31 AUG TO 8 SEP. 
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS DURING ANNOUNCED PERIODS.

DANGER AREA 1:
FROM 05 SEPT 1900 UTC  TO 08 SEPT 0200 UTC.
A. 69-00.0N 012-18,0E
B. 70-17.0N 016-15.5E
C. 72-19.5N 013-54.5E
D. 69-17.0N 006-37.0E

DANGER AREA 2:
DAILY BETWEEN 1900 AND 0200 UTC FROM 02 SEPT TO 03 SEPT.
A. 68-49.0N 015-46.0E
B. 68-53.0N 015-39.0E
C. 69-00.0N 015-44.0E
D. 69-03.0N 015-55.0E
E. 69-12.0N 016-12.0E
F. 69-19.0N 016-12.0E
G. 69-25.0N 016-04.0E
H. 69-38.0N 016-17.0E
I. 69-30.0N 016-48.0E
J. 69-14.0N 016-58.0E
K. 68-58.0N 016-11.0E
L. 68-54.0N 016-13.0E
M. 68-50.0N 016-04.0E

DANGER AREA 3:
DAILY BETWEEN 1100 AND 1400 UTC FROM 01 SEPT TO 05 SEPT.
A. 69-17.8N 016-33.0E
B. 69-16.0N 016-54.0E 
C. 69-10.0N 016-42.0E 
D. 69-11.0N 016-34.0E 
E. 69-15.0N 016-31.0E

DANGER AREA 4:
DAILY BETWEEN 1900 AND 0200 UTC FROM 31 AUG TO 08 SEPT. 
A. 69-24.0N 016-05.0E 
B. 69-15.0N 016-18.0E 
C. 69-15.0N 016-42.0E 
D. 69-24.0N 016-55.0E
E. 69-38.0N 016-55.0E 
F. 69-38.0N 016-05.0E

DANGER AREA 5:
DAILY BETWEEN 1900 AND 0200 UTC FROM 31 AUG TO 08 SEPT.
A. 69-53.5N 014-26.5E 
B. 69-20.0N 015-22.0E 
C. 69-38.0N 016-49.0E 
D. 70-11.0N 015-54.0E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 16/20
